walk_up_dir_path_to_find_git_config: walk up the directory tree from a given path to find the first parent directory containing a .git/config file
run_find_git_config_cli: run the CLI tool with a target directory argument to find and print the git repo root path
test_walk_up_dir_path_to_find_git_config: test the walk_up_dir_path_to_find_git_config function with a directory path and verify it returns a tuple of success boolean and repo path
review_walk_up_dir_path_to_find_git_conf: review the walk_up_dir_path_to_find_git_config function to understand how it walks up the directory tree checking for .git/config
refactor_walk_up_dir_path_to_find_git_co: refactor the walk_up_dir_path_to_find_git_config function to support additional git detection strategies beyond .git/config
